field_values.action_summary: In the colorless Kansas prairie, the family lives under the shadow of potential cyclones. As a massive storm approaches from two directions, Uncle Henry prepares for the worst while Aunt Em directs Dorothy toward safety.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of desolate landscape and approaching storm clouds; Mid/Close shots of weathered faces (aunt_em, uncle_henry); Low angle shots of farmhouse against darkening sky
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting shift from bright/gray to dark/stormy
Wind speed and direction affecting hair and clothing
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the desolate, colorless Kansas prairie and the looming threat of a dual-direction cyclone. The sequence must transition from mundane farm vigilance to escalating dread as weather conditions deteriorate.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- aunt_em
- uncle_henry
- toto

## Required Environments
- farmhouse_interior_and_cellar
- kansas_prairie_landscape

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting shift from bright/gray to dark/stormy
- Wind speed and direction affecting hair and clothing

## Beat List
- BT001: Establishing the desolate landscape and approaching storm
- BT002: Mundane vigilance of the family
- BT003: Escalating dread as storm closes in
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
